Supportive profile | Intraday post (29/Dec)

Weekly post:

"This time is different" | Weekly post (29/Dec - 02/Jan)

Soon - maybe after New Year - I will drop a post updating the earlier “AI bubble” post. A lot of challanges are coming for 2026…

Now, let’s jump in to the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The speed profile shows that customers selling vol into both direction, but like 2x more vol is sold to the downside than to the upside, so the net speed profile is negative. Daily vol of vol is also negative. The path of the least resistance points towards the upside, but ranges are expected to be compressed.

Centroid is at 6890.96Market will decide to move into either direction, and then the most starts to slow down.

Upside pivot is at 6921.63Upside target is at 6955.45This level would reject the spot, but if 6930 can be hold into the PM session, 6945 can pin.

Downside pivot is at 6882.07Downside target is at 6856.20Higher vol needed to break through the pivot, and the downside target would provide us a reversion opportunity back to the pivot that is pinning then.Low probability scenario is that market holds below the pivot into 2PM, then 6869.29 is a local magnet.

During the last 2 hours, the area of the centroid is sticky, a bit with downside magnet towards the downside pivot. Market expects some careful move. But the profile is meant to swallow any vol spike.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
